title: Pack of 20 Blue Polka Dot Cellophane Bags with Ties Christmas Gifts Paper Wrap Hen Party Wedding Birthday Favours Box
features: Cello Bags measure approximately 30cm x 13cm (11" x 5") and come with twist ties

Fill with sweets or party favours to thank guests for attending, or combine with tissue paper and curling ribbon to wrap small gifts. Ideal for handing out treats at a birthday party, wedding, Christmas party or other special occasion.
Color: Blue, Pack Includes: 20 Large Polka Dot Paper Bags
Good seal to your foods: these twist ties are 4 inches long, made of polyester and iron wire, durable and easy to shape; Can provide good seal to your foods and be applied as decoration
Wide application: you can use this set of treat bags and twist ties to decorate your party or to hold different small items, such as gifts, candies, cookies, lollipops, etc.
